layout.layout_rhythm: signal: high density, high formality. Deep navy canvas with bone paper and a single muted-gold accent; institutional with quiet weight.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_x": "7.5vw", "pad_y": "5.5vh", "gap_lg": "4vh", "gap_md": "2.5vh", "gap_sm": "1.2vh", "grid_cell": "80px"}

template_json_typography.style: transitional serif headlines + clean sans body + technical mono captions; full Chinese serif/sans support

design_tokens_typography.style: transitional serif headlines + clean sans body + technical mono captions; full Chinese serif/sans support

typography.typography_role: transitional serif headlines + clean sans body + technical mono captions; full Chinese serif/sans support

cjk_policy.known_degradation: The system's most distinctive typographic treatment (roman + italic-gold mid-sentence inside Source Serif 4 headlines) is fundamentally a Latin-typographic move that does not translate. Neither Noto Serif SC nor Noto Sans SC ships an italic axis, and inventing one via CSS `font-style: italic` produces an oblique/slanted glyph that reads as broken rather than

template_json_palette.description: deep navy primary with warm bone paper alternate and a single muted-gold accent; restrained, institutional, no decorative color

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: bold_border.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Source Serif 4 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Serif Pro 与 思源宋体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 DM Sans 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 IBM Plex Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 IBM Plex Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: ative — it is the emphasis vehicle inside headlines and inside lead paragraphs. Underline does not exist. Bold within body does not exist; if body needs emphasis, switch to the italic serif gold `<em>` pattern. Line-height runs tight at display scale (0.96 on display, 1.08 on h1) and opens as size

italic.raw_value: private intelligence briefing.
